name: AntiFold
description: Given an input antibody structure, generate a set of sequences for that backbone (inverse folding). Specify to only design certain CDRs. Achieved 60% amino acid sequence recovery in CDR3 on AbMPNN test set, compared to 56% with AbMPNN and 35% with ProteinMPNN. Next steps may include inputting the resulting sequence into ImmuneBuilder or AlphaFold to verify the result.
capabilities: Given an input antibody structure, generate a set of sequences for that backbone (inverse folding)
Specify to only design certain CDRs
Achieved 60% amino acid sequence recovery in CDR3 on AbMPNN test set, compared to 56% with AbMPNN and 35% with ProteinMPNN
Next steps may include inputting the resulting sequence into ImmuneBuilder or AlphaFold to verify the result

heavyChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody heavy chain

lightChainId.description: Chain ID of the antibody light chain

includeAntigen.description: Whether to include the antigen in the structural context for design

regionsToMutate.description: Regions to design, e.g. CDR1, CDRH1, CDR3, or FW1. IMGT numbered CDRs used by default.
